# programs.ripgrep-all

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.ripgrep-all`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters` | `list of (submodule)` | Custom adapters that invoke external preprocessing scripts. See <link xlink:href="https://github.com/phiresky/ripgrep-all/wiki#custom-adapters"/>. |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.args` | `list of string` | The output path hint; the placeholders are the same as for rga's `args` |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.binary` | `absolute path` | The path of the binary to run |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.description` | `string` | A description of this adapter; shown in rga's help |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.disabled_by_default` | `null or boolean` | If true, the adapter will be disabled by default |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.extensions` | `list of string` | The file extensions this adapter supports |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.match_only_by_mime` | `null or boolean` | if --rga-accurate, only match by mime types, ignore extensions completely |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.mimetypes` | `null or (list of string)` | If not null and --rga-accurate is enabled, mime type matching is used instead of file name matching |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.name` | `string` | The unique identifier and name of this adapter; must only include a-z, 0-9, _ |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.output_path_hint` | `null or string` | Setting this is useful if the output format is not plain text (.txt) but instead some other format that should be passed to another adapter |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.custom_adapters.*.version` | `signed integer` | The version identifier used to key cache entries; change if the configuration or program changes |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ripgrep-all (rga). |
| `programs.ripgrep-all.package` | `null or package` | The ripgrep-all package to use. |
